title: ichnocarpus frutescens var. leptodictyus
intro: Ichnocarpus frutescens var. leptodictyus, also known as the Indian periwinkle or Blue periwinkle, is a plant species belonging to the Apocynaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antihelmintic properties. The health benefits associated with Ichnocarpus frutescens var. leptodictyus include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve wound healing, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
